ops.body: T0 done (export --push exit 0: traces 4374/445, sft 3189/335, dpo 470/48, kto 4374/445, gate 15135/1542, watcher 6067/631; watcher train_digest fa2a9a3b0bf32b3b; pushed to yasyf/cc-steer-traces). T1 BLOCKED by a new finding: freeze-eval's EmptyEvalContext guard rejected the GATE view — 217/1542 test and 2244/15135 train gate rows render as bare role blocks. Root shape: gate_sample.window_json rows (schema cc-transcript.context/2, fidelity 'full', preview_chars 200) have EMPTY turn contents in before/trigger/after while trigger.preview carries real text that gate_text() drops; some rows (interrupt_rejection, rand negatives) are empty even in preview. Dominated by question_answer (1731 train). The 07-15 fix arc's export invariant (EmptyWatcherPrompt) never covered the gate view's text channel, and 6d4f06a's gate-sample reconciliation didn't repair window content. The old eval-v2 frame is preserved in ~/.Trash/cc-steer-eval-v2-wiped-20260716. Fix in flight as T0.5; freeze (T1) resumes after re-export passes both views.
